summary: Diff adds a Motoko backend actor with per-principal storage, plus a React + TanStack Router/React Query frontend implementing authentication gating, first-run setup metadata, builds/items CRUD UI, and JSON import/export utilities. Some BuildRequest requirements are either not evidenced (due to truncation) or appear partially implemented.

missing_requirements.requirement: First-run setup must ask for app meaning/description, what a build represents, and preferred units/currency (optional), and persist all answers as metadata.
missing_requirements.reason: The first-run setup UI and backend metadata type only include description and definitionBuild; there is no evidence of units/currency being collected or stored.

missing_requirements.requirement: Backend methods return Result-style responses (success/error) with user-friendly error strings for common failures (missing id, invalid quantity, etc.).
missing_requirements.reason: The backend code shown uses traps for authorization and returns plain values (e.g., createBuild returns Nat) rather than Result-style responses; no Result type or structured error returns are evidenced in the visible backend snippet.

missing_requirements.requirement: Provide developer documentation (README or equivalent) with steps to run locally (dfx start/deploy) and deploy on the Internet Computer.
missing_requirements.reason: No README or documentation file is present in the provided diff summary (only code files are shown).

hallucinated_features.description: Custom access-control/authorization system with admin token initialization via URL secret parameter and permission checks around profile/metadata/build operations.
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest only requires Internet Identity authentication and per-principal data scoping; it does not request an additional admin-token-based access control layer or URL-secret initialization.
evidence: backend/main.mo (imports authorization/MixinAuthorization and authorization/access-control; uses AccessControl.hasPermission/isAdmin; includes MixinAuthorization)

hallucinated_features.description: User profile feature requiring users to set a display name before first-run metadata setup.
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest does not require collecting/storing a user profile name as a prerequisite flow; only first-run app metadata (meaning/build definition/units) was requested.
